results.title: Air India Express set to open bookings for inaugural international flight to Abu Dhabi
results.description: On June 17, Navi Mumbai International Airport Ltd (NMIAL) chief executive officer BVJK Sharma told the media that the airport was looking to start international operations for passengers and freight services from July 15.

results.title: When Anurag Kashyap 'threatened to crush skull' of a Karan Johar's colleague
results.description: Will Anurag Kashyap mention this incident of his life in his upcoming book? After the announcement of his book, Dharma Productions executive Somen Mishra recalled an incident in which the filmmaker allegedly threatened to "smash his head against a wall."

results.title: Looking for your phone after waking up? Sadhguru suggests a different morning habitMornings and phones
results.description: Sadhguru, the spiritual guide, recommends a phone-free start to the day, promoting the idea of smiling as a true source of joy. He believes that authentic happiness arises from our inner selves, rather than being dependent on external circumstances or others. A simple smile, taking just seconds, can transform one’s outlook and create a positive energy that resonates throughout the whole day.

results.title: AUS-W vs NED-W Live Streaming Details: When And Where to Watch ICC Women’s T20 World Cup 2026 Match Live in India, Australia, Netherlands And Worldwide
results.description: Australia's women's cricket team will look to continue their rampant run when they meet the Netherlands in the ICC Women's T20 World Cup 2026 game at the Rose Bowl in Southampton on June 20, Saturday. With another win, Australia can seemingly cement their spot in the semi-finals too.
